title: Coob's Potions
description: Unique textures for each potion! (includes limited mod suppoort)
body:
Unique textures for each potion which try to indicate what effect the potion gives.
Requires CIT or Optifine for versions below 1.21.4 (1.21.4+ in the works)

Current mod support:
- Alex's Caves
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Farmer's Delight
- Quark
- Supplementaries

Comment suggestions :)
